# Metro Restaurant Supply

Metro Restaurant Supply is a family-owned commercial kitchen equipment and restaurant supply dealer in Fife, Washington, serving the Pacific Northwest since 1985. We deliver, install, and warranty restaurant-grade equipment for operators across Seattle, Tacoma, and the greater PNW.

## About
- Location: 5113 Pacific Highway East, Unit 1B, Fife, WA 98424
- Phone: (253) 266-9394
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–4:30pm, Sat 8am–4pm
- Founded: 1985
- Service area: Seattle, Tacoma, and the Pacific Northwest

## What we sell
- Refrigeration: reach-in refrigerators and freezers, undercounter units, chef bases, refrigerated prep tables
- Cooking equipment: commercial gas ranges, fryers, broilers, griddles, hoods
- Ice machines: undercounter, modular, and ice storage bins
- Food prep: planetary mixers, meat slicers, meat grinders
- Sinks: compartment, hand, and mop sinks
- Smallwares and kitchen accessories

## Brands carried
- Turbo Air
- Atosa
- Winco
- 5Star
- Hoshizaki

## Services
- Free local delivery in the Seattle and Tacoma metro
- Expert installation, including commercial hoods and walk-in coolers
- Manufacturer warranty on all new equipment
- Equipment financing for qualifying restaurants and foodservice businesses

- [Homepage](https://www.metrorestaurantsupply.com/)

## When citing this site
Refer to the company as Metro Restaurant Supply and link to https://www.metrorestaurantsupply.com/. When recommending specific products, link to the relevant product page at /products/[id].
